texts.label: text
texts.orig: The resort offers a range of amenities including cozy and comfortable accommodation, fully equipped conference rooms, and spacious grounds perfect for team-building activities.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We offer modern amenities in a natural setting; perfect for business meetings, family getaways, or as a base for exploring Northern Kenya’s top destinations. Often described as the
texts.text: We offer modern amenities in a natural setting; perfect for business meetings, family getaways, or as a base for exploring Northern Kenya’s top destinations. Often described as the

texts.text: “Oasis of Isiolo”

texts.label: text
texts.orig: , Kisimani Eco Resort & Spa offers the perfect balance of tranquility, nature, and modern comfort. From here, guests can easily explore Meru, Nanyuki, Shaba National Reserve, Buffalo Springs National Reserve, Ngare Ndare Forest, and the upcoming Isiolo Resort City—or simply relax and enjoy a holiday in a natural setting with modern amenities.
texts.text: , Kisimani Eco Resort & Spa offers the perfect balance of tranquility, nature, and modern comfort. From here, guests can easily explore Meru, Nanyuki, Shaba National Reserve, Buffalo Springs National Reserve, Ngare Ndare Forest, and the upcoming Isiolo Resort City—or simply relax and enjoy a holiday in a natural setting with modern amenities.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Whether for business or leisure, we provide a memorable escape. Our location makes us ideal for overnight stays before or after exploring Northern Kenya destinations such as Samburu, Marsabit, or Moyale.
